info.title: Capgo Public API
info.summary: REST API for managing Capgo organizations, apps, live update channels, bundles, devices, analytics, and API keys.
info.description: Use this API to automate Capgo Cloud instead of clicking through the dashboard. Authenticate every request by sending a raw Capgo API key in the `authorization` header. Do not prepend `Bearer` unless the published Capgo docs change. Standard accounts are limited to 100 requests per minute and enterprise accounts are limited to 1000 requests per minute. Capgo's public API currently uses API-key authentication rather than OAuth or OIDC discovery metadata.

tags.name: members
tags.description: Organization member invitations, roles, and removals.

tags.name: bundles
tags.description: Live update bundle registration, metadata, and channel assignment.

tags.name: statistics
tags.description: App, organization, user, and bundle usage analytics.

get.summary: List accessible organizations or fetch one organization by `orgId`.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Optional organization identifier for a single-organization lookup.

put.summary: Update an organization. Admin access is required.

delete.summary: Delete an organization by query parameter.

post.summary: Invite a member or update an existing member role.

200.description: Member invitation or role change accepted.

delete.summary: Remove a member from an organization.

get.summary: List apps visible to the API key.
Fetch one app by app identifier.

put.summary: Update one app by app identifier.

delete.summary: Delete one app by app identifier.

get.summary: List API keys available to the authenticated account.

200.description: Created API key. The raw secret may only be returned once.

delete.summary: Delete an API key by numeric identifier.

post.summary: Create or update a channel configuration.

get.summary: List devices for one app or fetch one device by `device_id`.

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Optional device identifier for a single-device lookup.

post.summary: Link a device to a channel or bundle override.

delete.summary: Remove a device-specific override so the device falls back to channel defaults.

post.summary: Register a new bundle using an externally hosted zip URL and checksum.

put.summary: Attach a bundle to a channel.

delete.summary: Delete one bundle or all bundles for an app.

post.summary: Update bundle metadata such as release link or comment.

get.summary: Get time-series statistics for one app.
Get bundle usage distribution for one app.
Get aggregated statistics across organizations visible to the API key.

CapgoApiKeyAuth.name: authorization
CapgoApiKeyAuth.description: Send the raw Capgo API key in the `authorization` header. Generate or rotate keys at https://console.capgo.app/dashboard/apikeys/.

ValidationError.description: The request body or query parameters were invalid.

Unauthorized.description: The API key is missing, invalid, or expired.

Forbidden.description: The API key is valid but lacks the required scope or org access.

RateLimited.description: Too many requests. Back off and retry later.
